description: Conversation full of trailing off, interrupted thoughts, and mid-sentence redirections. New hire orientation on Thursday at 2 PM in the training room.

events.title: New Hire Orientation
events.reasoning: Despite numerous trailing sentences and mid-thought corrections, Alice and Carol settle on Thursday at 2 PM in the training room on the third floor for a new hire orientation.
events.assumptions: Duration assumed 1 hour per Alice's 'I don't know, an hour'. 'Training room on three' interpreted as Training Room, third floor.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 event: new hire orientation on Thursday at 2 PM in the training room with Alice and Carol.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Thursday = 2026-02-26. Challenge: sentence fragments ending in '...', mid-sentence pivots, and wandering from Wednesday to Thursday before landing on a final answer.
